name: workloop
description: Work supervisor and portable loop kernel for coding agents

scripts.test:matrix: node --test tests/authority-transaction.test.mjs tests/git-main-authority.test.mjs tests/git-linked-worktree-authority.test.mjs tests/git-partitioned-multitask-authority.test.mjs tests/git-exclusive-worktree-authority.test.mjs tests/command-safety-adversarial.test.mjs tests/foreign-session-scope.test.mjs tests/host-authority.test.mjs tests/host-hooks.test.mjs tests/roadmap-e2e.test.mjs tests/workloop-architecture.test.mjs tests/event-store.test.mjs tests/task-snapshot-v3.test.mjs tests/runtime-v5.test.mjs tests/runtime-v6.test.mjs tests/installer.test.mjs tests/skills.test.mjs tests/windows.test.mjs
